definitions.description: Read, update, write and delete data from Airtable
definitions.subtitle: ={{ $parameter["operation"] + ": " + $parameter["resource"] }}

options.name: Create
options.description: Create a new record in a table

options.name: Create or Update
options.description: Create a new record, or update the current one if it already exists (upsert)

options.name: Delete
options.description: Delete a record from a table

options.name: Get
options.description: Retrieve a record from a table

options.name: Search
options.description: Search for specific records or list all

options.name: Update
options.description: Update a record in a table

properties.errorMessage: Not a valid Airtable Base URL
Not a valid Airtable Base ID

Not a valid Airtable Table ID

options.name: typecast
options.description: Whether the Airtable API should attempt mapping of string values for linked records & select options

options.name: ignoreFields
options.description: Comma-separated list of fields in input to ignore when updating

options.name: updateAllMatches
options.description: Whether to update all records matching the value in the "Column to Match On". If not set, only the first matching record will be updated.

properties.name: id
properties.description: ID of the record to delete. More info.

properties.name: id
properties.description: ID of the record to get. More info.

properties.name: options
properties.description: Additional options which decide which records should be returned

options.name: downloadFields
options.description: The fields of type 'attachment' that should be downloaded

properties.name: filterByFormula
properties.hint: If empty, all the records will be returned
properties.description: The formula will be evaluated for each record, and if the result is not 0, false, "", NaN, [], or #Error! the record will be included in the response. More info.

properties.name: returnAll
properties.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

properties.name: limit
properties.description: Max number of results to return

properties.name: options
properties.description: Additional options which decide which records should be returned

options.name: downloadFields
options.description: The fields of type 'attachment' that should be downloaded

options.name: fields
options.description: The fields you want to include in the output

properties.errorMessage: Not a valid Airtable View URL
Not a valid Airtable View ID

properties.name: sort
properties.description: Defines how the returned records should be ordered

values.name: field
values.description: Name of the field to sort on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

options.name: ASC
options.description: Sort in ascending order (small -> large)

options.name: DESC
options.description: Sort in descending order (large -> small)

definitions.name: n8n-nodes-base.airtable

definitions.description: Read, update, write and delete data from Airtable

properties.displayName: New node version available: get the latest version with added features from the nodes panel.
properties.name: oldVersionNotice

properties.displayName: This type of connection (API Key) was deprecated and can't be used anymore. Please create a new credential of type 'Access Token' instead.
properties.name: deprecated

options.name: Append
options.description: Append the data to a table

options.name: Delete
options.description: Delete data from a table

options.name: List
options.description: List data from a table

options.name: Read
options.description: Read data from a table

options.name: Update
options.description: Update data in a table

properties.name: application
properties.description: The Airtable Base in which to operate on

properties.errorMessage: Not a valid Airtable Base URL
Not a valid Airtable Base ID
Not a valid Airtable Table URL
Not a valid Airtable Table ID

properties.name: addAllFields
properties.description: Whether all fields should be sent to Airtable or only specific ones

properties.name: fields
properties.description: The name of fields for which data should be sent to Airtable

properties.name: id
properties.description: ID of the record to delete

properties.name: returnAll
properties.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

properties.name: limit
properties.description: Max number of results to return

properties.name: downloadAttachments
properties.description: Whether the attachment fields define in 'Download Fields' will be downloaded

properties.name: downloadFieldNames
properties.description: Name of the fields of type 'attachment' that should be downloaded. Multiple ones can be defined separated by comma. Case sensitive and cannot include spaces after a comma.

properties.name: additionalOptions
properties.description: Additional options which decide which records should be returned

options.name: fields
options.description: Only data for fields whose names are in this list will be included in the records

options.name: filterByFormula
options.description: A formula used to filter records. The formula will be evaluated for each record, and if the result is not 0, false, "", NaN, [], or #Error! the record will be included in the response.

options.name: sort
options.description: Defines how the returned records should be ordered

values.name: field
values.description: Name of the field to sort on

options.name: ASC
options.description: Sort in ascending order (small -> large)

options.name: DESC
options.description: Sort in descending order (large -> small)

options.name: view
options.description: The name or ID of a view in the Stories table. If set, only the records in that view will be returned. The records will be sorted according to the order of the view.

properties.name: id
properties.description: ID of the record to return

properties.name: id
properties.description: ID of the record to update

properties.name: updateAllFields
properties.description: Whether all fields should be sent to Airtable or only specific ones

properties.name: fields
properties.description: The name of fields for which data should be sent to Airtable

options.name: bulkSize
options.description: Number of records to process at once

options.name: ignoreFields
options.description: Comma-separated list of fields to ignore

options.name: typecast
options.description: Whether the Airtable API should attempt mapping of string values for linked records & select options
